statements.sql: select * from `users` where `id` = 2 and `users`.`deleted_at` is null limit 1
select * from `sites` where `sites`.`id` in (1074) and `sites`.`deleted_at` is null

select `permissions`.*, `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` as `pivot_permission_id`, `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `permissions` inner join `model_has_permissions` on `permissions`.`id` = `model_has_permissions`.`permission_id` where `model_has_permissions`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_permissions`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'

select `roles`.*, `model_has_roles`.`model_id` as `pivot_model_id`, `model_has_roles`.`role_id` as `pivot_role_id`, `model_has_roles`.`model_type` as `pivot_model_type` from `roles` inner join `model_has_roles` on `roles`.`id` = `model_has_roles`.`role_id` where `model_has_roles`.`model_id` in (2) and `model_has_roles`.`model_type` = 'App\\Models\\User'
